ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "tomatometer_score" TEXT /* Tomatometer score of the film */,
  "audience_score" TEXT /* Audience score of the film */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office earnings of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the film's release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person involved in the film */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the person involved in the film */,
  "job" TEXT /* Specific job of the person involved in the film */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person (e.g., Director, Producer, Executive Producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the person */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office earnings of the film */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit made from the film */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* Return on investment (ROI) of the film */,
  "revenue_streams" TEXT /* Revenue streams of the film */,
  "marketing_budget" TEXT /* Marketing budget of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "tomatometer_score" TEXT /* Tomatometer score of the film */,
  "audience_score" TEXT /* Audience score of the film */,
  "critical_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critical reviews */,
  "user_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the film in minutes
Box office earnings of the film
ID of the person involved in the film
Department of the person involved in the film
Specific job of the person involved in the film
Role of the person (e.g., Director, Producer, Executive Producer)
Date of birth of the person
Place of birth of the person
Unique identifier for each financial record
Box office earnings of the film
Return on investment (ROI) of the film
Unique identifier for each rating record
